title: World of Wonders
description: Fully client-side modpack for the World of Wonders Minecraft server, focused on performance, stability, FPS improvements, and visual enhancements.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b92075095317a1588600cb499fdd75de3573f40.png)

## 🌟 World of Wonders – Client-Side Modpack

World of Wonders is a **fully client-side Minecraft modpack**, created specifically for players of the **World of Wonders Minecraft server**.

This modpack does **not** add gameplay advantages and does **not** require server-side installation.
Its purpose is to provide a **stable, smooth, and visually enhanced experience** while playing on the server.

---

## 🌍 Language Notice

This modpack is currently **Dutch-focused**.
If there is enough interest from international players, an **English version will be created** in the future.

---

## ⚙️ What This Modpack Includes

### 🚀 Performance & Optimization

* Improved FPS
* Reduced lag
* Faster loading times
* Increased overall stability

### 🎨 Visual & Graphical Enhancements

* Enhanced lighting and animations
* Improved particles and effects
* UI improvements and visual polish

### 🧩 Quality-of-Life Improvements

* Client-side usability features
* No impact on gameplay balance

### 🔒 100% Server-Safe

All included mods are allowed and safe to use on the World of Wonders server.

---

## 🎢 Built for the World of Wonders Server

* Tuned specifically for the server environment
* Matches the intended visuals and atmosphere
* Prevents visual inconsistencies or missing features
* Updated alongside server changes

---

## 📥 Important Information

* Required for the **best experience** on the World of Wonders server
* Works in **singleplayer and multiplayer**
* **No server-side mods required**
* Mods recommended by the server creators are included

---

## ⚖️ Mod Ownership & Credits

All mods included in this modpack are **not created or owned by me**.
Each mod remains the **intellectual property of its respective author(s)** and is used in accordance with their licenses.

Full credit belongs to the original mod creators.

---

## ❤️ Credits

Modpack curated and maintained by **Onnoembare** for the **World of Wonders Minecraft server**.
Thank you for playing and supporting the project.
